content.en:
Ye Tian comprehended the hundredth Dao Monument and aroused the resonance of the hundredth Dao Monument.

In an instant, a stone staircase appeared in front of him, leading to the endless depths.

"It's ......"

Ye Tian was shocked.

Because this doesn't seem to be going to the third realm, but a deeper place, ~ could it be that there is a fourth realm?

Ye Tian walked up this stone step with doubts.

However, the other peak Legendary Realm lords didn't sense this stone step at all, and only thought that Ye Tian had entered the third realm.

After stepping into the stone steps, Ye Tian clearly sensed the changes in the time and space around him, as if he had crossed a long distance in one step, leading to the unknown depths.

After a while, he had walked all the stone steps and came to a new world.

Just then, a voice rang out.

"Endless Lord Ye Tian, control a hundred paths, and obtain the qualification to apply for the preparatory members of the Eternal Temple, do you want to apply?"

A voice rang out from the darkness.

The Temple of Eternity?

Ye Tian was puzzled, it was the first time he had heard of this name, so he didn't know anything about it, and he didn't know how to answer.

So, Ye Tian asked, "What is the Hall of Eternity?"

The mysterious voice sounded again: "The Eternal Hall is a force established by some Eternal Controllers, in addition to the Eternal Masters who can join, only a very small number of peak Legendary Realm Lords can join, and the Three Thousand Dao Monuments are both an opportunity and an assessment, you have comprehended a hundred Dao Monuments, so you have obtained this qualification." However, in order to truly join the Eternal Temple, one must complete other assessments before becoming one of the members of the Eternal Temple. "

The Temple of Eternity built by the Eternal Master!

Ye Tian knew very well how terrifying such a force was, if he joined the Eternal Palace, it would be of great help to become the Eternal Master.

So, he immediately said, "I want to apply to become a preparatory member of the Eternal Temple!"

Wow!!!

A golden scroll appeared in front of Ye Tian, Ye Tian held it in his hand, and after opening it, three requirements appeared on it.

Requirement 1: Master 300 Paths!

Requirement 2: Reach the Eighth Order of Eternal Will!

Requirement 3: Break through the third floor of the Daoyu Tower!

Ye Tian knew that the Dao Domain Tower, it was located in the third Dao Domain of the Dao Domain City, and the Dao Domain Tower could test his strength and hone his combat effectiveness.

Because when it comes to the peak Legendary Realm Lord, it is difficult to fight unscrupulously, and there is no way to arrange a formation to condense the opponent of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord.

Therefore, the Peak Legendary Realm Lord can only exercise his combat power unless he fights with other Peak Legendary Realm Lords.

And the Dao Domain Tower is the place where the Eternal Controller has established, so that he can condense one opponent after another, so that the peak Legendary Realm Lord can test the battle haze

According to his understanding, the opponents of the first sub-level of the Dao Domain Tower were comparable to the third level of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord, the opponents of the second layer were comparable to the third and fourth levels of the Peak Legendary Realm Lords, and the opponents of the third layer were comparable to the fourth level of the Peak Legendary Realm Lords.

Therefore, it is very difficult to break through the third floor of the Daoyu Tower.

Ye Tian didn't have to complete all three requirements before he could join the Eternal Palace, he only needed to complete two at all.

Strictly speaking, that's not too much to ask.

For example, the fourth or fifth level of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord may be able to satisfy two of them, but they may not have the opportunity to join the Hall of Eternity, because the Peak Legendary Realm Lord cannot find the Eternal Master, nor can he find the Hall of Eternity.

It's all about chance!

And this time, Ye Tianwu understood a hundred monuments, controlled a hundred daos, and met the conditions, so he was invited by the Eternal Hall to participate in further assessments.

Some of the fifth-level peak Legendary Realm lords did not control a hundred Dao, so even if they came to Dao Domain City, they would not meet the conditions.

At this time, Ye Tian was wondering if the old man with white beard was a member of the Eternal Temple?

The white-bearded old man knows a few Eternal Masters and has become friends with the Eternal Masters, so if the white-bearded old man wants to join the Eternal Palace, it is naturally not difficult.

"When you get out, visit the white-bearded old man and ask about the situation. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Immediately, he took a look at his surroundings.

The place he was currently located in was supposed to be the core area of Daoyu City, where there was a large purple tree that stood in the infinite plane and plane.

And he's under the tree right now.

He sat cross-legged under the tree, and found that the tree made him understand the supreme technique of creating time and space more quickly.

Moreover, he had a feeling that he could only come to this place once, and he could only come often unless he joined the Temple of Eternity.

He can go to the Third Dao Domain at any time, and he can enter the Dao Domain Tower at any time in the future, even if the Dao Domain City is closed.

Therefore, he didn't want to waste time going to the Dao Domain Tower to test his combat power now.

"I will practice here until the city of the Dao Domain is closed, and this opportunity must be grasped. "

Ye Tian began to work hard to comprehend, and with the help of this mysterious purple tree, he continued to comprehend the supreme technique of creating time and space.

Time passed slowly, and the purple tree emitted a large amount of purple aura, pouring into Ye Tian's body, and this purple aura increased his spiritual light comprehension many times.

Moreover, the fusion of time and space has become very easy at this moment.

Immediately.

Ye Tian disbanded the other copy bodies, condensed the copy bodies here, and cultivated here at the same time, not wasting a single opportunity.

............ 0

Eternal epoch after eternity has passed.

Soon, Daoyu City will be closing.

"It's a pity, it's going to be moved!

Ye Tian sighed.

The next moment, his body was moved.

Not only him, but the other peak Legendary Realm lords were all moved out and appeared in the void of the Void Region one by one.

However, Ye Tian could sense the location of the Dao Domain Tower at this time, and he could enter the Dao Domain Tower at any time, which was one of the benefits of the preparatory members of the Eternal Palace.

"Endless Lord, how's the harvest?"

The Lord of the Word appeared beside Ye Tian and asked.

Ye Tian smiled and said, "The harvest is okay, but it's a pity that the time is too short." "

The Lord of the Dark Word nodded again and again: "Yes, the time is too short, if I enter it a few more times, I may have the hope of completing the space-time fusion and stepping into the second level of the peak Legendary Realm Lord." "

"Let's go, let's go back. "

Ye Tian said.

In an instant, the two of them tore through the void and returned to the Infinite Sea.

After returning, Ye Tian continued to retreat and comprehend in the Infinite Heaven and Earth, and the Lord of the Dark Word also continued to retreat and cultivate, digesting all the insights he had gained in the Dao Domain City this time

Before you know it, dozens of eternal epochs have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally created the third space-time supreme technique, and it was also an incomparably powerful supreme technique, surpassing the other two space-time supreme techniques. _
